# msg-bridge Copilot Instructions

This is the **msg-bridge** project — a WeChat Official Account message bridge built with Express + TypeScript.

## MANDATORY: Load Project Skill First

When working on ANY code in this project, you MUST load and read the project skill file FIRST before generating any response or making any changes:

**Skill file:** `.agents/skills/msg-bridge-conventions/SKILL.md`

This skill defines the project's coding conventions, response format, routing patterns, naming rules, and code style. All changes must follow these conventions.

## Available Skills

- **msg-bridge-conventions** (`.agents/skills/msg-bridge-conventions/SKILL.md`) — Project-specific coding conventions. Load for ALL code changes.
- **nodejs-express-server** (`.agents/skills/nodejs-express-server/SKILL.md`) — General Express.js best practices. Load when building new routes, middleware, or server features.
